question: How much have I made from selling eggs this month?

retrieval_results.context:
User sold 40 dozen eggs this month and currently sells eggs to neighbor for $3 a dozen, indicating a steady income stream from egg sales.
The user intends to record feed expenses in the variable expenses section: $150 spent on chicken feed and $250 spent on goat feed this month.
The user wants to modify the budget template to track homemade chicken feed: record the cost of grains purchased from a local farm and the value of the feed produced, subtracting the value from total feed costs.
User is making his own chicken feed using grains from a local farm, seeks resources to optimize feed recipe and ensure nutrition for his flock.
User wants to expand product offerings to include goat milk cheese and yogurt, uses milk from goats Billy and Nanny, and has been experimenting with cheese and yogurt production with decent results.
The user wants to set up a budget template to better track expenses for their small farm.
The user recorded a $100 expense for antibiotics given to Boris the rooster, and plans to add a potential vet visit for Nanny the goat with a placeholder cost.
The user plans to record a $200 cost for replacing the fencing around the chicken coop as a capital expense in the budget template.
User wants to expand online presence via social media or blog, seeks advice on getting started and content ideas.
User is training goats Billy and Nanny to walk on a leash, using positive reinforcement with treats, and seeks tips on leash training.
